rag_rules: Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes, using visible identifiers and concrete bounds.
Use AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and constants within annex agree blocks.
generic_rules: Ensure type declarations in AGREE match the actual AADL types of expressions.
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only paths.
Avoid referencing AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations and expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Equations are declared as `eq name : type = expression;`.
Constants are declared as `const name : type = value;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
